description_long: This is a weathered, cylindrical metal barrel with a dark upper section and a rusty red lower section. The surface is marked with patches of rust and wear, giving it an aged, industrial appearance. Prominently displayed on one side is a yellow warning label with a black explosion symbol and the word 'EXPLOSIVE', indicating hazardous contents. The barrel features several horizontal reinforcement ribs around its circumference, adding structural strength. The top is sealed with a flat metal lid, featuring two small circular bungs for filling or emptying. The overall look suggests it is used for storing or transporting dangerous materials in industrial or urban environments.
description: A rusty, reinforced metal barrel with an 'EXPLOSIVE' warning label and a sealed lid, showing heavy wear and industrial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow 'EXPLOSIVE' warning label and the most prominent rust patches.
description_view_1: Side view with no visible label, showing more of the rusty, worn surface and reinforcement ribs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, label not visible, highlighting the dark upper section and overall cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: Rear side view, similar to view 2, with a focus on the rusty texture and banding.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: yellow 'EXPLOSIVE' warning label with explosion symbol
